data.biography: Ryuho Nagaoka (長岡 龍歩, Nagaoka Ryūho, 10 de febrero) es un actor de voz japonés de la Prefectura de Hyogo. Está afiliado a 81 Produce. Graduado de Yoyogi Animation Academy. Habla el dialecto de Kansai. Sus pasatiempos y habilidades especiales son el canto, el baile y las acrobacias.
data.name: Ryuho Nagaoka

data.biography: Ryuho Nagaoka (長岡 龍歩, Nagaoka Ryūho, February 10) is a Japanese voice actor from Hyogo Prefecture. He is affiliated with 81 Produce. He graduated from Yoyogi Animation Academy. He speaks the Kansai dialect. His hobbies and special skills are singing, dancing and acrobatics.
data.name: Ryuho Nagaoka

data.biography: 长冈龙步（日语：長岡 龍歩／ながおか りゅうほ Nagaoka Ryūho，2月10日—）是一名日本男性声优，兵库县出身，81 Produce所属。
data.name: 长冈龙步

data.biography:
長岡龍步是日本的男性聲優。代代木動畫學院畢業。

興趣：唱歌、跳舞

特長：特技表演

方言：關西腔
data.name: 長岡龍步

data.biography: 長岡龍步是日本的男性聲優。出身於兵庫縣，所屬公司為 81 Produce。
data.name: 長岡龍步
